understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, progressing through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) attempt to move the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction; moves can fail if blocked by walls/obstacles or level boundaries. Some adjacent objects are pushable blocks, which can be pushed if directly in the movement direction and if space allows. Levels may include multiple selectable pieces; control switches via CLICK on a selectable’s exact pixel/grid position (the same coordinate system used by player.position and objects). The movement_*_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and don’t guarantee success or failure.
